segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did the rider not get off the bus at Woodford Green?

translations.zh-Hans: 乘客为什么没有在伍德福德绿地站下车？

segments.text: I love traveling in the country, but I don't like losing my way.

translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢在乡间旅行，但不喜欢迷路。

segments.text: I went on an excursion recently, but my trip took me longer than I expected.

translations.zh-Hans: 最近我去远足了一次，但旅途花的时间比预计的更长。

segments.text: I'm going to Woodford Green, I said to the conductor as I got on the bus, but I don't know where it is.

translations.zh-Hans: “我要去伍德福德绿地，”上车时我对售票员说，“但我不知道它在哪里。”

segments.text: I'll tell you where to get off, answered the conductor.

translations.zh-Hans: “我会告诉你在哪里下车，”售票员回答。

segments.text: I sat in the front of the bus to get a good view of the countryside.

translations.zh-Hans: 我坐在公共汽车前部，以便好好欣赏乡间景色。

segments.text: After some time, the bus stopped.

translations.zh-Hans: 过了一段时间，公共汽车停了。

segments.text: Looking round, I realized with a shock that I was the only passenger left on the bus.

translations.zh-Hans: 我环顾四周，吃惊地发现自己是车上仅剩的一名乘客。

segments.text: You'll have to get off here, the conductor said.
This is as far as we go.
Oh dear, said the conductor suddenly.
I forgot to put you off.
We're going back now, said the conductor.

translations.zh-Hans: “我们现在要往回开了，”售票员说。

segments.text: Well, in that case, I prefer to stay on the bus, I answered.

translations.zh-Hans: “既然这样，我还是留在车上吧，”我回答。
